figures.caption: Fig. 4. The evolution of the agent states with time.
Fig. 2. The reference graphs for 8 agents and 10 agents represented from Lm.

Fig. 1. Example of directed weighted graphs representing each LT (k). The color of the edges denotes the corresponding weight, as indicated by the color bar for each graph. Modes 1 and 2 correspond to the modes for an 8-agent network, while Modes 3− 5 correspond to the modes for an 10-agent network.
